item.title: Memory on Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta on the Claude Platform, letting agents learn and improve across different sessions. https://t.co/6DhcXKhrT9
item.description: Memory on Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta on the Claude Platform, letting agents learn and improve across different sessions. https://t.co/6DhcXKhrT9

item.title:
Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem on the three issues we found.
All are fixed in v2.1.116+ and we’ve reset usag
item.description:
Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem on the three issues we found.
All are fixed in v2.1.116+ and we’ve reset usage limits for all subscribers.
